title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR. Needs deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, plus cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is essential. Finout is a cloud cost-management company trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft.
score_reason: Excellent alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS expertise directly matches, Salesforce admin and revenue analytics are core strengths, and Tel Aviv hybrid role fits location preferences perfectly. The scale (30M+ ARR) and cross-functional leadership demands match Omri's senior executive background.

Your 15+ years building revenue infrastructure and experience with globally distributed teams reporting to CROs aligns perfectly with what the CRO is looking to build—especially given Finout's ambitious growth trajectory with customers like Wiz and Lyft. The Tel Aviv hybrid setup also seems like it could be a natural fit given your location preferences.
